# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: se-thirdparty-apis
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  exportTo:
    - "."
  hosts:
    - api.stripe.com
    - api.twilio.com
    - api.sendgrid.com
    - api.segment.io
    - api.github.com
    - api.openai.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
  ports:
    - number: 443
      name: https
      protocol: TLS
  subjectAltNames:
    - api.stripe.com
    - api.twilio.com
    - api.sendgrid.com
    - api.segment.io
    - api.github.com
    - api.openai.com
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: se-external-databases
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  exportTo:
    - "."
  hosts:
    - postgres.example-db.com
    - mysql.example-db.com
    - redis.example-cache.com
    - kafka.example-stream.com
    - elastic.example-search.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
  ports:
    - number: 5432
      name: tcp-postgres
      protocol: TCP
    - number: 3306
      name: tcp-mysql
      protocol: TCP
    - number: 6379
      name: tcp-redis
      protocol: TCP
    - number: 9092
      name: tcp-kafka
      protocol: TCP
    - number: 9200
      name: tcp-elasticsearch
      protocol: TCP
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: vs-egress-thirdparty-apis
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  exportTo:
    - "."
  hosts:
    - api.stripe.com
    - api.twilio.com
    - api.sendgrid.com
    - api.segment.io
    - api.github.com
    - api.openai.com
  tls:
    - match:
        - port: 443
          sniHosts:
            - api.stripe.com
      route:
        - destination:
            host: api.stripe.com
            port:
              number: 443
    - match:
        - port: 443
          sniHosts:
            - api.twilio.com
      route:
        - destination:
            host: api.twilio.com
            port:
              number: 443
    - match:
        - port: 443
          sniHosts:
            - api.sendgrid.com
      route:
        - destination:
            host: api.sendgrid.com
            port:
              number: 443
    - match:
        - port: 443
          sniHosts:
            - api.segment.io
      route:
        - destination:
            host: api.segment.io
            port:
              number: 443
    - match:
        - port: 443
          sniHosts:
            - api.github.com
      route:
        - destination:
            host: api.github.com
            port:
              number: 443
    - match:
        - port: 443
          sniHosts:
            - api.openai.com
      route:
        - destination:
            host: api.openai.com
            port:
              number: 443
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: vs-egress-external-databases
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  exportTo:
    - "."
  hosts:
    - postgres.example-db.com
    - mysql.example-db.com
    - redis.example-cache.com
    - kafka.example-stream.com
    - elastic.example-search.com
  tcp:
    - match:
        - port: 5432
      route:
        - destination:
            host: postgres.example-db.com
            port:
              number: 5432
    - match:
        - port: 3306
      route:
        - destination:
            host: mysql.example-db.com
            port:
              number: 3306
    - match:
        - port: 6379
      route:
        - destination:
            host: redis.example-cache.com
            port:
              number: 6379
    - match:
        - port: 9092
      route:
        - destination:
            host: kafka.example-stream.com
            port:
              number: 9092
    - match:
        - port: 9200
      route:
        - destination:
            host: elastic.example-search.com
            port:
              number: 9200
